title: horkelia webberi
intro: Horkelia webberi, also known as Webber's horkelia, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Horkelia webberi include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Horkelia webberi can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves in a tincture or salve for topical use.
